request.normalization: chart.result[0] OHLCV; requested half-open range; non-finite/nonpositive rows removed; high/low expanded to include open/close; unadjusted

recipe.failClosed: Any request, canonical byte identity, exact selection index, or transform drift is an error.

request.normalization: Yahoo split events through the frozen cutoff; sorted by effective timestamp.

splitEvidence.note: Yahoo chart quote OHLCV is retrospectively normalized for split events even when adjusted-close output is disabled.

universeEvidence.evidence: The frozen single-instrument universe was selected before model calls and is evidenced by the pinned provider-bar receipt.
